name: FinTech Club - Head of IT
activities: Led a team to develop History Chess Game project - a chess game that brings Vietnamese rich history (mostly focus on the born of a dynasty) to players. Additionally, the game is powered by a private blockchain network that enable user to gain coins via playing game and use the earned coins to buy or trade NFT items.

Supervise the enhancement of FinTech Club Website to transfer the website into a CMS platform that allows club members to dynamic manage the website content (research papers, podcast, videos) and also deliver better user experience.
